title: Cam's Scythes
description: "i made scythes" -Cametized 2025 - A small datapack that adds three scythes to the game that serve as a nice choice between the two extremes of Sword and Axe.
body:
scythes made by cam hence; **cam scythes** these serve as either an inbetween or a combination of an axe and a sword you be the judge of which

thank you to _Kaido_ for contributing to the 1.2 mod package!!!!!! # Items & Recipes: Emberglaive, the fire scythe hit enemies have a trail of fire ![Emberglaive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/108ea129cc3d18de98425c0ea26e238ec3c8377c.png) Plaything, the fast one ![Plaything](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e013a269b866c2663df6b7ea320c5f023e4e7e.png) Vinecog, the powerful one ![Vinecog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e29cb6ad20cf23bf2445648d62f0a9afd5743c5.png)
